title: Here’s What Happened in the War in the Middle East on Saturday
summary_full: The war with Iran escalated on Saturday as the Iran-allied Houthis joined the conflict and Israel bombarded Tehran with airstrikes.
summary_public: The war with Iran escalated on Saturday as the Iran-allied Houthis joined the conflict and Israel bombarded Tehran with airstrikes.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: The war with Iran escalated on Saturday
